name: Bel Air Limousine
recent_news: No evidence of school-bus / student-transportation operations found in web searches; appears to be a very small (2-employee) limousine operator in Tacoma. Different from 'Belair Transport' (separate company).
fit_notes: Not a fit. 2-employee limo service with no confirmed school-bus contracts; sub-scale for a Summit tuck-in even if confirmed.

name: Assisted Transportation Svc
owner_or_parent: American Student Transportation Partners (ASTP) / CVC DIF (infra fund of CVC Capital Partners); previously Access Holdings
districts_or_customers: Kansas school districts (Topeka, Kansas City area)
recent_news: Sept 2023: Assisted Transportation joined ASTP platform (PE-backed by Access Holdings). 2025: CVC DIF agreed to acquire ASTP from Access Holdings via DIF Infrastructure VII. Now part of CVC's infrastructure portfolio.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. PE-owned by CVC DIF (formerly Access Holdings) under ASTP platform — competitor to Summit. Already consolidated.

name: Distinct Limousine Inc
recent_news: No evidence of school bus / student transportation operations. Hilliard City Schools operates its own 157-bus fleet in-house; Distinct Limousine does not appear among district vendors.
fit_notes: Not a fit. 2-employee limousine company, no confirmed student-transport business; far below Summit tuck-in scale.

name: Lacey Limousines
recent_news: Operating since 1999 as a first-class limousine service for weddings, parties, executive outings, and proms in the Columbus OH area. No school bus contracts identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Small special-occasion limo operator; no school-district contracts and well below Summit tuck-in scale.

name: Castle Car Svc
districts_or_customers: Independent medical examinations, rehab, treatments, doctor appointments — Mid-Michigan
recent_news: Operating since 2002 providing non-emergency medical transportation in Mid-Michigan. No school district / student transportation contracts identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Independent NEMT operator (not school-bus / SPED student transport); 2-employee scale is far below Summit tuck-in threshold.
